svg.title: Floor Plate — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Plate frame: X=width(0..148), Y=depth(0..60), Z=thickness(0..-4)

g.text: 1. 2x M3 x 8 mm SHCS from bottom face, into M3 x 5.7 mm heat-set inserts in tray floor boss pads.
2. 0.30 mm x 45° chamfer on all four bottom-face perimeter edges (elephant's foot mitigation).
3. Print orientation: bottom face (Z=-4) on build plate, top face (Z=0) up. No supports needed.
4. Counterbore recesses screw head 0.20 mm below bottom face (3.20 depth > 3.00 head height).
5. Hole positions symmetric about plate X centerline (X=74). Both holes on Y centerline (Y=30).
